nasb.text: They fastened a blue cord to it, to fasten it on the turban above, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And they tied to it a cord of blue to fasten it on the turban above, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 又用一條藍色細帶子把牌子繫住，繫在禮冠的上面，都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 然后用一条蓝色的带子把这个牌子系在礼冠上。这些都是照耶和华对摩西的吩咐做的。
